'''ramava''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:whale|whale]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-m-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:whale|whale]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| ramava
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræmævæth|ræmævæth]] || [[word:ræmævæj|ræmævæj]] || [[word:ræmævæsh|ræmævæsh]] || [[word:ræmævæ|ræmævæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ramamavath|ramamavath]] || [[word:ramamavaj|ramamavaj]] || [[word:ramamavash|ramamavash]] || [[word:ramamava|ramamava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ramavath|ramavath]] || [[word:ramavaj|ramavaj]] || [[word:ramavash|ramavash]] || [[word:ramava|ramava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ramafvath|ramafvath]] || [[word:ramafvaj|ramafvaj]] || [[word:ramafvash|ramafvash]] || [[word:ramafvaf|ramafvaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ramavatha|ramavatha]] || [[word:ramavaja|ramavaja]] || [[word:ramavasha|ramavasha]] || [[word:ramavaka|ramavaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ramavath|ramavath]] || [[word:ramavaj|ramavaj]] || [[word:ramavash|ramavash]] || [[word:ramava|ramava]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ramavathal|ramavathal]] || [[word:ramavajal|ramavajal]] || [[word:ramavashal|ramavashal]] || [[word:ramavakal|ramavakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ramavathatha|ramavathatha]] || [[word:ramavajaja|ramavajaja]] || [[word:ramavashasha|ramavashasha]] || [[word:ramavaka|ramavaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ramavathan|ramavathan]] || [[word:ramavajan|ramavajan]] || [[word:ramavashan|ramavashan]] || [[word:ramavakan|ramavakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ramavathaoro|ramavathaoro]] || [[word:ramavajaoro|ramavajaoro]] || [[word:ramavashaoro|ramavashaoro]] || [[word:ramavakaoro|ramavakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
